goal: Create plugins/draft-autosave.js that saves msgInput.value to localStorage every 2s (debounced)
sub_tasks: T1: Create IIFE skeleton with __DraftAutosaveInited guard
T4: saveFn: if text is empty, removeItem, else setItem with try/catch guard
T5: On page load (plugin init): read from localStorage and set msgInput.value if present
T6: Subscribe to HermesProxy.on('sessionChanged', id) to read stored draft for new session
guard_focus: Does it save to localStorage debounced (not on every keystroke)?
Is localStorage access wrapped in try/catch?
Does the key include sessionId (per-session drafts)?
Is empty draft removed from storage?
On session change, does it load the saved draft?
Does it avoid overwriting the input with stale drafts after user sends?
notes: ~40 lines. No server changes. Uses beforeSend hook from core or we can just not clear on send for now.
